title: BVAGSS 6 Pack Small Dog Blanket, Super Soft Warm Pet Cover Blankets, Paw Print Puppy Fleece Flannel Blanket for Small Medium Dogs and Cats XH075 (60 x 40 cm, Blue)
features: 【Soft and Warm】The puppy blanket is made of fleece, which is soft and comfortable to touch. This provides furry comfort for your furry pet. In winter, it can provide a warm environment for your kitten and puppy. Tips: Our two blankets are folded together and packed. So there are only three blankets from the appearance, but actually there are six. Please open the package for confirmation.

【Available】Our dog fleece flannel blankets have different sizes: Small(60x40 cm), Best for pets up to 2 kg. Medium(76x52 cm), Best for pets up to 8.2kg. Large(104x76 cm), Best for pets up to 17.2 kg. 60x80cm is Best for pets up to 9 kg. 80x100cm is Best for pets up to 15.8 kg.Please measure your pet and place an order according to the recommended size.

【Multipurpose】 Our pet blanket also can be used as towels and mat. Covering cold surfaces at home with a flannel blanket can also protect your car seat from hair or pet cages. Perfect as a small blanket for dogs, cats, hamsters, guinea pigs, rabbits and other small animals.

【Multipack】Each set contains 6 cute paw print blankets with a simple and beautiful appearance to add cuteness to your pets. The quantity is also sufficient for your pet's daily use and replacement. You can choose different styles and colors of flannel pet blanket according to your preference.

【Cute Design and Washable】Adorable paw print designs adorn this kitten blanket for an even cuter look. Our puppy blankets pack are machine washable. Just machine wash blankets at your convenience and hang them to dry to keep their shape and look like new!
description: Product Description BVAGSS 6 Pack Small Dog Blanket This BVAGSS blankets consists of 6 packs. There are enough quantities for your replacement needs. Colors and styles are easy to match with your furniture. To keep it clean, it's recommended to change the blanket regularly, so this multi-piece set is perfect for you and your pet! This BVAGSS fleece blankets can be used in pet kennels, beds and dens, ideal for placing on the bottom or top of a crate, and also protects furniture or car seats from scratches and pet hair. And the size of this blankets is more suitable for small dogs. This is a great blanket to give to your furry friend as a gift! Anywhere No matter where your dogs and cats likes to rest, such as a sofa, car seat, office chair or bed. This fleece dog blankets cover is perfect for protecting your furniture from unwanted pet hair, scratches and scratches from scratching and chewing. Soft and Comfy The cat blanket is made by double-sided fleece, it is so soft and lightweight.Provides a very comfortable environment for your pet to rest. Lovely pattern The whole blanket is decorated with animal palm prints to make it look lovely and friendly. Your animal friends will love it. The 6 pack of dog blankets are designed in very versatile and nice colors. Adorable paw print designs adorn this kitten blanket. 6 packs are also enough for your pet's daily use and replacement. BVAGSS always puts pets first and is committed to providing better and more comfortable products for dogs and cats!
